h1963e0adgc528g42e9gb002gdaa79c5b1728: I wanted to fight, like you. Now they're just going to make me feed the animals again.
h4194fb66ged69g4255ga5c5g76c3a7b970d4: I hate you. You killed all the goblins and now we can't practice swords any more.
hcd835599gcfc3g4912g89b3g24a962e574a2: I know people are hurt, but don't worry. I'll guard them on the road.
ha8fbb5ebg007ag4d0bgba77g98ee222468dd: Everyone looks so tired. You should have let me help.
h24f0bb9bg07d9g49eagb9f3g18db3c5ce701: Just shout if you need help up there.
h682c9b8agd552g4e47g8535ge8b24ebdb215: You should be manning the wall. I wanted to, but Asharak says I'm needed here.
